skills.name: paper-curation
skills.title: Paper Curation Legacy Router
skills.description: Compatibility entrypoint that routes paper-curation requests to the managed harness-only skill bundle.
skills.triggers: paper curation, 논문 큐레이션, curate papers, Zotero paper review, paper-curation
skills.purpose: Route legacy invocations to the appropriate managed paper-curation skill without running pipeline internals directly.
skills.safety: Refresh the managed bundle, then choose the specific setup, doctor, topic, search, curation, smoke, or deploy workflow for the user request.

skills.name: paper-curation-router
skills.title: Paper Curation Router
skills.description: Canonical router for selecting the correct paper-curation managed skill.
skills.triggers: paper-curation help, paper-curation route, paper curation workflow
skills.purpose: Choose the narrow managed skill for the request while keeping execution inside the Node CLI harness.
skills.safety: Do not invent topics, credentials, deployment targets, or direct pipeline commands.

skills.name: paper-curation-setup
skills.title: Paper Curation Setup
skills.description: Install or refresh the managed skill bundle and configure a current-user paper-curation checkout.
skills.triggers: paper-curation install, paper-curation setup, paper-curation first run, paper-curation fresh config
skills.purpose: Bootstrap the checkout, secrets, and topic configuration through the CLI harness.
skills.safety: Inspect `.env` and `config.json` without printing secrets. Use `--reuse-config` only after verifying the collections belong to the current Zotero account.

skills.name: paper-curation-doctor
skills.title: Paper Curation Doctor
skills.description: Diagnose the configured paper-curation runtime through the CLI harness.
skills.triggers: paper-curation doctor, paper-curation diagnose, paper-curation health check
skills.purpose: Run the supported doctor check and report observed pass, warning, and failure counts.
skills.safety: Report redacted failures and local remedies only; never expose credentials.

skills.name: paper-curation-topic
skills.title: Paper Curation Topic Resolver
skills.description: List configured paper-curation topic aliases from the current checkout without setup or writes.
skills.triggers: paper-curation topic, choose Zotero collection, configured topic alias
skills.purpose: Read configured `zotero.collections` aliases and select only a valid user-owned topic.
skills.safety: This command is read-only and prints aliases only. If multiple topics are valid and the request is unqualified, ask the user to choose because Zotero writes and LLM cost change.

skills.name: paper-curation-search-register
skills.title: Paper Curation Search Register
skills.description: Search for recent papers and register candidates through the paper-curation harness.
skills.triggers: latest papers, recent papers, search and register papers, 최신 논문 찾아줘
skills.purpose: Run web-source curation for an explicit configured topic, day window, and candidate count.
skills.safety: `--max-papers` limits web search/register candidates only. Keep both deploy suppressors unless using the explicit deploy skill.

skills.name: paper-curation-curate-review
skills.title: Paper Curation Curate Review
skills.description: Review or curate an existing Zotero collection locally through the paper-curation harness.
skills.triggers: review Zotero papers, curate collection, Zotero 논문 리뷰해줘
skills.purpose: Run local Zotero curation for a configured topic without deployment.
skills.safety: Keep both deploy suppressors for ordinary local curation and preview work.

skills.name: paper-curation-smoke
skills.title: Paper Curation Smoke
skills.description: Run bounded one-paper local verification through the paper-curation harness.
skills.triggers: paper-curation smoke, bounded verification, test one paper
skills.purpose: Verify one paper in scratch/local mode after setup or runtime changes without deploying.
skills.safety: Use this for bounded verification; keep both deploy suppressors.

skills.name: paper-curation-deploy
skills.title: Paper Curation Deploy
skills.description: Publish paper-curation outputs only after the user explicitly requests deployment.
skills.triggers: paper-curation deploy, publish paper curation, 배포
skills.purpose: Run the harness-owned deployment path for a configured topic after explicit user approval.
skills.safety: Deployment is not a smoke, preview, setup, repair, or ordinary curation action. Never run Git commands directly for deployment; the harness owns publishing behavior.
